title: Ubiquiti UTP-G3-Touch-Enterprise
description: Ubiquiti UTP G3 Touch Enterprise is the new generation of VOIP desk phones. The phone is controlled via a 7" display with a resolution of 1280 x 800 HD , which supports Multi-touch technology. For connectivity, there are 2 gigabit LAN ports available. The phone can be powered via PoE+ or USB-C with a maximum power consumption of 5 W 7" touch screen 5MP video camera Power supply via USB-C and PoE+
specsSearch: Wireless features WiFi standards 802.11a, 802.11b/g, 802.11n, 802.11ac Image Screen size ["] 7 Display resolution 1280 x 800 Connectors and Interfaces Touchscreen Yes LAN speed (2) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Other features 3,5 jack connector, Bluetooth
